description: Klaviyo is a B2C CRM and marketing automation platform for email, SMS, WhatsApp, customer data, and analytics. It helps businesses manage customer profiles, events, campaigns, flows, and related marketing operations.
summary: Klaviyo exposes a versioned REST API at `https://a.klaviyo.com` with OpenAPI specs, plus a streamable-HTTP MCP server at `https://mcp.klaviyo.com/mcp?include-mcp-app=true`; auth uses private API keys, OAuth access tokens, and for specific client endpoints a public API key/site ID.
